title: AN ACT TO AMEND TITLES 18 AND 29 OF THE DELAWARE CODE RELATING TO HEALTH CARE.

actions.description: was introduced and adopted in lieu of SB 334
Amendment SA 1 to SS 1 - Introduced and Placed With Bill
Amendment SA 1 to SS 1 - Passed By Senate. Votes: 19 YES 2 ABSENT
